# Unshakeable Faith
## Scripture
"Let us hold fast the confession of our hope without wavering, for he who has promised is faithful." – Hebrews 10:23
## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we often face challenges that test our faith and resolve. We may feel shaken by the world around us or by personal struggles within. But God calls us to stand firm in our convictions, to hold fast to our hope in Him. This isn't about being stiff-necked or obstinate, but about trusting in the character of our God. He is faithful, and His promises are true.

In the midst of uncertainty, remember that God's faithfulness remains unchanged. He is the rock that doesn't move, the anchor that holds fast. As you face your own struggles today, hold fast to the confession of your hope. Trust in God's goodness and His promise to see you through.

## Daily Challenge
"Run 10 laps around your house or backyard, praying for the strength to stand firm in your faith."
